title: Студия 18.5 м²
subtitle: Скандинавский
description: Светлый, в дереве, с текстилем. Для тех, у кого вечером должно быть ощущение «как у бабушки в воскресенье».

title: Студия 20 м²
subtitle: Японди
description: Минимум вещей, мягкий свет, натуральные тона. Подходит интровертам и тем, кто работает из дома.

title: Студия 29.9 м²
subtitle: Лофт
description: Кирпич, тёмное дерево, открытый металл. Для тех, кто чувствует себя дома в кофейне на Патриарших.

title: Студия 30.4 м²
subtitle: Современный
description: Глубокий синий, золотой акцент, стекло. Если ваш день расписан по календарю — это ваш стиль.

images.title: Прихожая
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a small modern contemporary style entryway in a premium studio apartment, about 3 square meters. Deep navy blue walls with subtle texture, light oak hardwood floor in herringbone pattern. Built-in cabinetry with matte dark navy panels and brass long pull handles serving as wardrobe and shoe storage. Large rectangular mirror with thin brass frame on the wall. Single brass wall sconce providing warm focused light. Glass-and-brass console with a sculptural ceramic bowl. Refined, masculine, deep navy + brass + glass palette. NO beige, NO yellow tint. Architectural photography, sharp focus, eye-level.

images.title: Санузел
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a modern contemporary style bathroom in a premium studio, about 4 square meters. Walls in dark navy blue large-format porcelain tiles with subtle veining, herringbone marble floor in light tones for contrast. Floating vanity in matte dark navy with white marble counter, under-mount sink, brass tap, brass fixtures. Large rectangular mirror with thin brass frame, integrated LED light strip. Walk-in shower with frameless glass and same dark navy tile, rain shower head in brass. White wall-mounted toilet. Brass shelf with rolled white towels. Soft warm refined lighting. Navy + marble + brass + glass palette. NO beige, magazine quality, sharp focus.

images.title: Жилая комната
images.prompt: Photorealistic interior of a 30-square-meter modern contemporary studio combined living-kitchen-bedroom area. Kitchen along one wall: matte dark navy lower cabinets with brass long handles, white marble countertop with subtle grey veining, brass tap, integrated appliances behind matching navy panels, glass and brass open shelf above with a few ceramic objects. Round marble-top dining table with two upholstered dark teal chairs and a sculptural brass pendant lamp above. Queen bed against opposite wall with deep navy bedding and ivory throw, two upholstered cream nightstands with brass table lamps. Single sculptural glass coffee table in a small seating area near a large window with sheer linen curtains. Light oak herringbone parquet floor. One accent wall in deep navy blue, other walls in soft warm white. Soft natural daylight. Sharp focus, magazine quality, eye-level. Deep navy + brass + glass + ivory palette. NO yellow tone overall, NO heavy beige.
